note: A recorded synthetic-caller session: caller text, the Hear-stream hypothesis of the synthesized caller audio (for WER), the Omni agent transcript, TTFB + turn latency, a tool call, and a barge-in. Hand-authored to PASS and to exercise every scorer; replace by recording a real --live run.

turns.caller_says: Hi, I'd like to book a cleaning for next week.
turns.asr_hypothesis: Hi I'd like to book a cleaning for next week
turns.agent_text: I can help with that. We have a cleaning open Tuesday at 2 PM or Wednesday at 10 AM. Which works for you?
Great — you're booked for a cleaning on Wednesday at 10 AM. Anything else?

turns.caller_says: Actually — wait, can you make it the afternoon instead?
turns.asr_hypothesis: Actually wait can you make it the afternoon instead
turns.agent_text: No problem — I moved your cleaning to Wednesday afternoon at 2 PM. You're all set.
